channel.title: GitHub Zig Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Zig in GitHub

item.title: tigerbeetle/tigerbeetle
item.description: The financial transactions database designed for mission critical safety and performance.

item.title: oven-sh/bun
item.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one

item.title: ziglang/zig
item.description: General-purpose programming language and toolchain for maintaining robust, optimal, and reusable software.

item.title: Not-Nik/raylib-zig
item.description: Manually tweaked, auto-generated raylib bindings for zig. https://github.com/raysan5/raylib

item.title: pedropark99/zig-book
item.description: An open, technical and introductory book for the Zig programming language

item.title: ZigEmbeddedGroup/microzig
item.description: Unified abstraction layer and HAL for several microcontrollers
